column1: # - Rows where the regex caught `bp_current_user_can(...)` (BuddyPress) are kind=unknown action=investigate.
# - Rows where the regex caught the literal text inside a /** docblock */ are kind=unknown action=investigate.
#   variable; they already prefer wp_is_ability_granted/wp_get_ability when available. Marked unknown/investigate
#   so 3.2/3.3 review whether to drop the legacy current_user_can fallback once Abilities API is mandatory.
